workflow-config.description: Dependency rules configuration for workflow entity type, including allowed dependencies (feature→workflow, workflow→action) and depends_on_ordered field support

grade-runtime-config.description: Grade file path (default: sibling to code-graph), agent capture triggers, enabled dimensions

grade-snapshot.description: Fixed schema for a single code-graph health snapshot: timestamp, graph hash, dimension metrics (coverage, connectivity, cross-linking, orphan count, staleness, granularity), raw counts and ratios per dimension

grade-file-integrity.description: Grade file is append-only, must survive graph rebuilds, must not be clobbered by code-graph regeneration. Same graph state must produce identical metrics.

grade-determinism.description: Given identical code-graph state, grading produces identical snapshot. Grade file persists across graph rebuilds. Metrics improve when gaps are fixed.

graph-health-dimensions.description: Scoring dimensions captured per snapshot: entity coverage ratio, connectivity (orphan count/ratio), cross-link count (spec-to-code, code-to-spec), dependency edge count, entity counts by type

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Software developer using know CLI to manage specification graphs

enhance-graph-model.name: Enhance Graph Model
enhance-graph-model.description: Extend spec-graph capabilities to support complex product requirements

workflow-branch-entity.name: Workflow Entity Type
workflow-branch-entity.description: Add workflow entity with ordered action dependencies to spec-graph model

bulk-get-by-type.name: Bulk Get by Type
bulk-get-by-type.description: Enhanced get command to retrieve all entities of a type with full JSON content using know get --type <typename>

list-count.name: List Count
list-count.description: Add --count flag to list command to count entities by type using know list --type <typename> --count

graph-filter-prefix.name: Graph Filter by Prefix
graph-filter-prefix.description: Add --prefix flag to graph used-by to filter dependencies by prefix using know graph used-by --prefix <prefix>

code-graph-scoring.name: Code Graph Scoring
code-graph-scoring.description: Automatic structural health capture for code-graph, recorded by agents at runtime. Fixed schema, append-only history in sibling grade file.
